target.title: fix(copilot): disable eager tool streaming for Claude 4.5
target.body:
## Summary

- disable Anthropic `eager_input_streaming` only for GitHub Copilot Claude 4.5 model IDs, whose proxy routes reject the field
- preserve eager tool streaming for newer Copilot Claude models that accept it
- cover dotted and hyphenated IDs across static defaults, synthetic forward-compatible models, and live catalog projection
- keep official Anthropic and OpenAI provider behavior unchanged

Fixes #75348.

This also fixes the Claude schema-rejection half of #91622. That issue should remain open for its separate `gpt-5.4-mini` Responses incomplete-turn report.

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/github-copilot/models.test.ts src/llm/providers/anthropic.test.ts`
- `pnpm format:check extensions/github-copilot/model-metadata.ts extensions/github-copilot/models.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
- `pnpm build`
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`, run `run_894063e553e1`
- live GitHub Copilot forced tool calls for `claude-haiku-4.5` and `claude-sonnet-4.6`
- live official Anthropic forced tool call for `claude-haiku-4-5`
- live official OpenAI forced tool call for `gpt-5.5`
- two fresh autoreviews: no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: GitHub Copilot Claude 4.5 tool requests fail because the Copilot proxy rejects Anthropic's per-tool `eager_input_streaming` field.

Real environment tested: Production GitHub Copilot, Anthropic, and OpenAI APIs through OpenClaw's provider transports; Linux changed gate in AWS Crabbox.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Exchanged the configured GitHub Copilot credential, built models through `buildCopilotModelDefinition`, and ran OpenClaw `completeSimple` requests with a forced `noop` tool choice for `claude-haiku-4.5` and `claude-sonnet-4.6`. Then ran forced `noop` tool calls through the official Anthropic `claude-haiku-4-5` and OpenAI `gpt-5.5` endpoints.

Evidence after fix: Before the patch, Copilot Haiku 4.5 sent `eager_input_streaming=true` and returned `400 tools.0.custom.eager_input_streaming: Extra inputs are not permitted`. After the patch, Haiku 4.5 sent no eager field and returned `stopReason=toolUse`, `tool=noop`. Copilot Sonnet 4.6 still sent the eager field and returned the same successful tool call. Official Anthropic and OpenAI forced tool calls also returned `stopReason=toolUse`, `tool=noop`.

Copied live console output:

```text
COPILOT_PROBE model=claude-haiku-4.5 eager=true stopReason=error tool=none error=400 tools.0.custom.eager_input_streaming: Extra inputs are not permitted
COPILOT_AFTER model=claude-haiku-4.5 eager=false stopReason=toolUse tool=noop error=none
COPILOT_AFTER model=claude-sonnet-4.6 eager=true stopReason=toolUse tool=noop error=none
ANTHROPIC_OFFICIAL_TOOL_PASS model=claude-haiku-4-5 stopReason=toolUse tool=noop
OPENAI_OFFICIAL_TOOL_PASS model=gpt-5.5 stopReason=toolUse tool=noop
```

Observed result after fix: Copilot Claude 4.5 tool calls work without reducing newer Claude tool-streaming capability or changing official Anthropic/OpenAI tool behavior.

What was not tested: The separate `gpt-5.4-mini` incomplete-turn behavior reported in #91622 was not reproduced or changed by this PR.
